pages.text: The Cradle's blobs are not biomancy's only creatures. The craft also produces $(flesh)flesh livestock$() — and the blobs themselves come in more shapes than the Cradle's calm corner.
pages.title: Creatures of Flesh

pages.text: $(bold)The blobs.$() Beyond the plain Flesh Blob there are $(flesh)Hungry$(), $(flesh)Primordial$(), $(flesh)Primordial Hungry$() and a $(flesh)Legacy$() variant — see $(l:2_cradle/the_spawn)What the Cradle Births$(). All of them can be $(l:1_harvest/flesh_plunderer)despoiled$() for their own loot.
pages.title: The Blob Family

pages.text: $(bold)Flesh livestock.$() Biomancy raises grown counterparts of the farm animals — the $(flesh)Flesh Cow$(), $(flesh)Flesh Sheep$(), $(flesh)Flesh Pig$() and $(flesh)Flesh Chicken$() — alongside the unusual $(flesh)Chroma Sheep$() and $(flesh)Thick Fur Sheep$(). They are the biomancer's herd: livestock that is itself a product of the craft.
pages.title: The Herd

pages.text: And there the index closes. From a sickle and a cut of meat to a base of breathing walls and a herd of grown cattle — the whole of it loops through the $(l:2_cradle/building_cradle)Cradle$() and the $(l:2_cradle/living_flesh)Living Flesh$() it gives. Tend those, and biomancy tends itself.
pages.title: The Index Closes
